nodes.label: The student shall register for the academic program to complete the enrollment process.
The system shall allow learners to sign up for the curriculum to finalize their registration.
The system shall grant guest users full access to all assessment materials.
The system shall restrict guest users from viewing any assessment materials.
The API shall retrieve the gradebook within 500 milliseconds.
The API shall retrieve the gradebook within 0.8 seconds.
The server shall archive the course materials upon term completion.
The application shall generate a progress report every 7 days.
The platform shall operate on Android and iOS platforms.
The mobile app shall consume less than 100MB of RAM.
The system shall send a reminder notification when a deadline approaches.
Students shall submit the assignment through the digital dropbox.
The interface shall unlock the next module after the user passes the quiz.
The API shall fetch the gradebook within 300ms under normal network conditions.
The server shall archive the course materials upon term completion.
The system shall provide a certificate for the graduate.
The portal shall play the video lecture using HTML5.
The dashboard shall synchronize the calendar every 10 minutes.
The module shall track the user participation during the live session.
The system shall limit the upload size to at most 25MB.
The instructor shall manage the academic course curriculum within the dashboard.
The student shall register for the program to complete the enrollment process.
The system shall host online quizzes and examinations for student assessment.
The application shall calculate the final grade automatically after the student completes the test.
The learner shall upload the scholarly assignment to the submission portal before the deadline.
The system shall provide discussion forums to facilitate peer communication and discourse.
The platform shall disseminate educational materials and lecture resources to all registered users.
The instructor shall conduct synchronous live virtual classes using integrated videotelephony.
The system shall generate a digital certificate of completion after the student finishes the course.
The API shall fetch the gradebook within 300ms under normal network conditions.
The interface shall load the dashboard within 2 seconds during peak load.
The system shall support 5000 concurrent users during synchronous live sessions.
The portal shall operate correctly on Windows, Linux, and macOS platforms.
The system shall provide accessibility features for users with visual impairments.
The interface shall display navigation menus clearly to ensure high usability.
The server shall maintain 99.9% availability during the academic semester.
The backup service shall run every 24 hours to prevent data loss.
The system shall encrypt all communication using TLS 1.3 or higher.
Users must authenticate using multi-factor authentication while accessing sensitive data.
The database shall delete temporary session data after the user logs out.
The system shall generate detailed error logs for the technical support team.
The source code shall follow standardized documentation patterns to facilitate maintenance.
The application shall support data export to standard CSV and XML formats.
The software must be installable on various cloud-based virtual machines without modification.
The student shall search for available course modules using keyword filters within the catalog.
The system shall track student participation during the synchronous live session.
The instructor shall update the educational content within the material repository every week.
The system shall allow students to submit course feedback upon the completion of the program.
Instructors must upload the course syllabus before the semester starts.
The instructor should provide qualitative feedback within 48 hours after an assignment submission.
The system should recommend additional course modules based on the student's enrollment history.
The interface should support dark mode to improve usability during night hours.
The application could allow students to customize their profile dashboard with external widgets.
The portal could integrate with social media platforms for course achievement sharing.
The application wouldn't support offline video downloads in the current phase of development.
The platform shall purge student records only after the user explicitly deletes their account.
